description: Transloadit is a file uploading and media-processing service that lets developers define workflows as JSON Assembly Instructions. It handles uploads, transformations, and exports to external storage providers through a hosted API platform.
summary: Transloadit exposes a JSON REST API at api2.transloadit.com, a hosted MCP endpoint at /mcp, a self-hostable MCP server package, and a Node-distributed CLI (`transloadit`).
